title: ITT we give Eva stuff fancy mythological fanon names
display_title: ITT we give Eva stuff fancy mythological fanon names
wikitext:
[]: ITT we give Eva stuff fancy mythological fanon names             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 16, 2006 9:36 pm I've seen this done before to subjects such as GNR who gets called Shekinah, so I've decided that like every remotely entertaining or interesting idea, it needs to be overused to the point it's tired and repetitive, so I ask of you, members of the Eva Monkey forums, to assist me in my quest to give absolutely anything in the Evangelion universe a corresponding mythological and/or religious name for absolutely no reason whatsoever . What about the Mass Production Evas? don't those guys form a Sephirot in EoE? I know! let's give them individual names based on their corresponding orbs of the Sephirot (EVA-01 doesn't count, or maybe it does), despite the fact the Sephirot in EoE is upside-down . Stolen from lolwikipedia because I know basically nothing about Kabbalah: - Kether Elyon (Crown) - Chokhmah (Wisdom) - Binah (Intelligence) - Gedulah (Love or Mercy) - Gevurah (Judgement (also Justice) - Tifereth or Rakhamim (Compassion)* - Netzach (Lasting Endurance) - Hod (Majesty) - Yesod (Basis or Foundation); - Malkuth** (Kingdom) *Fact, this is the spot EVA01 uses in the Sephirot depicted in EoE **The other name for this orb is Shekinah, we cannot use that because someone else already took it as their fancy fanon name.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 17, 2006 12:14 pm Angel Eggs = Mandorlas.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 17, 2006 2:12 pm Yeah... I don't understand the point of this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 17, 2006 3:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Yeah... I don't understand the point of this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 17, 2006 4:41 pm MaggotMaster wrote: does it even need to have a point it's in the chit-chat section

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 17, 2006 4:45 pm MaggotMaster wrote: or would you rather have another "who's the hottest eva female, lol" thread
